item.description:
### Fixed - Perch now finds Codex the way your terminal does. If you install Codex through a version manager (nvm, fnm, asdf) or only have the Codex desktop app, Perch could miss it entirely when launched normally — which quietly switched off the Codex improvements in 0.4.13 and the hook check added in 0.4.12. Both work now.
### Note - If you're on Codex 0.145 or newer, this adds one more Codex hook. Codex asks you to approve a hook before it will run it — Perch will say so in Settings. Run `/hooks` in Codex and trust Perch's entries.
